title: Update tests, docs and header for new OSCORE NVM failure path in protect_request
description: Update oscore.h documentation for oscore_protect_request to mention OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED and SSN persistence. Extend lichen/tests/oscore tests to cover NVM write failure case, mock the callback to return error, verify error returned and SSN state correctness. Reference project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.4.2.2.2.
